refnamediv.refpurpose: Converts a tsmat into time series

listitem.para: * tsmat = a tlist of type tsmat

variablelist.varlistentry:
Output
Nothing: the variables are directly created in the calling environment

refentry.refsection: DESCRIPTION Extract form a tsmat all time series or the one whose names have been given as input, adding optionnaly a prefix if a user have given one.

refsection.title: EXAMPLE
refsection.programlisting: tsmat=db2tsmat(GROCERDIR+'/data/bdhenderic.dat');// transforms Hendry and Ericsson database into a tsmat tsmat2ts(tsmat);//recovers the variables rnet, lm1, lp, ly from the tsmat
